sources.page_title: Fra-Ber Reef Descaler and Limescale Remover for Boats
sources.cleaned_content:
Fra-Ber Reef Descaler and Limescale Remover for Boats and Dinghies

Price: €10,81
Format: 750 ml
750 ml - €10.81 EUR

Delivery usually in 3-5 days

Product Images:
- https://shop.fra-ber.it/cdn/shop/files/disincrostante-e-anticalcare-professionale-per-barche-e-gommoni-reef-fra-ber.jpg?v=1699881964
- https://shop.fra-ber.it/cdn/shop/files/reef-750-ml-indicazioni-sicurezza-1_1ec9d88a-e744-4e11-b3e4-ebf1dc557c34.jpg?v=1732546295

THE BENEFITS OF REEF

Reef by Fra-Ber is a descaler and limescale remover for boats, dinghies and watercraft that's easy to apply, simplifying the removal of tough dirt in hard-to-reach places.

Main features:
- Removes oxidation and rust: it is an acidic detergent formulated to effectively remove limescale deposits, saltpetre efflorescence, rust, silicates, oxides and common boat stains like algae, waterline marks, mucilage, barnacles and limescale;
- Suitable for all boats: it can be used to clean boats, dinghies, tenders and sailboats;
- Ideal for cleaning the hull and metal surfaces: it can be used on the hull and on metal elements such as windshields, stanchions, ladders, roll cages, and chrome parts of boats and vessels;
- No added phosphates, EDTA and NTA*: The formulation takes into account the main environmentally hazardous substances to be avoided such as phosphates, EDTA and NTA.

*May contain traces.

REEF IS IDEAL
- For removing stubborn sea grime on all types of boat hulls;
- For removing rust and oxidation on metal surfaces caused by salt water and salt deposits;
- As a safe product for use on all types of watercraft including boats, sailboats, dinghies and tenders.

HOW TO USE REEF

We recommend using Reef as a descaler and limescale remover for boats.

Main steps:
- Spray the product evenly on the area to be treated;
- Leave on for 5 minutes before rinsing;
- In the case of stubborn dirt, repeat the procedure, using a brush or sponge if necessary.

Use: use the product pure.

Precautions: avoid prolonged contact with aluminium, linoleum and painted surfaces.

SAFETY INFO & DATA SHEET

PRODUCT CODE: 75130 - R:14 - REEF 750 ML

Also contains among other ingredients: Less than 5%: Nonionic surfactants. Fragrances. Preservatives (phenoxyethanol, benzisothiazolinone).

Data sheet: https://fraberantegnate-my.sharepoint.com/:b:/g/personal/onedrive_fra-ber_it/EQnHtkSZglpBirOhqcJ1BrABlcPvYC7P2t6r9ZMuMeIyyw?e=8VLeV2

sources.page_title: FRA-BER KO IRON 750ML Cleaner & Disinfectant For Body & Wheel
sources.cleaned_content:
FRA-BER KO IRON 750ML Cleaner & Disinfectant For Body & Wheel

Product Images:
- https://www.gecegy.com/web/image/product.product/5313/image_1024/%5BCCCCXX00041%5D%20FRA-BER%20KO%20IRON%20750ML%20Cleaner%20%26%20Disinfectant%20For%20Body%20%26%20Wheel?unique=fae836a
- https://www.gecegy.com/web/image/product.image/7574/image_1024/FRA-BER%20KO%20IRON%20750ML%20Body%20And%20Wheel%20Cleaner%20And%20Disinfectant?unique=4613483

Description:

FRA-BER KO IRON 750ML – Professional Iron & Rust Remover for Bodywork and Wheels

FRA-BER KO IRON is a powerful decontaminant and cleaner designed to remove ferrous residues, brake dust, and mineral deposits from all types of vehicle surfaces — including wheels, rims, and bodywork.

Its acid-free formula makes it completely safe for steel, alloy, chrome, and polished rims, while still offering high cleaning power. During use, the product changes color to purple, indicating it's actively dissolving iron particles, rust, and embedded contaminants.

Thanks to its low-odor formulation, KO IRON provides a pleasant and safe user experience, ideal for car wash centers, detailing workshops, and professional car care services looking for top-tier results.

Key Features:
- Removes iron dust, rust, and mineral residues effectively
- Safe for all types of rims and painted surfaces
- Acid-free and low-odor formula for easy use
- Creates a purple visual effect when reacting with iron particles
- Perfect for professional detailing and deep wheel cleaning

Directions for Use:
- Ready-to-use product (750 mL).
- Spray evenly on a cool surface.
- Wait 2–5 minutes until the product reacts and turns purple (do not let it dry).
- Rinse thoroughly with water.
- For stubborn dirt, use a detailing brush.
- For bodywork decontamination, work panel by panel.

Warnings:
- Always test on a small hidden area before full application.
- Do not apply on hot surfaces or allow the product to dry.
- Avoid contact with cast iron brake calipers.

Price: 390.00 EGP

The product is available – contact us to get the price.

Categories: Exterior Chemicals, Tires & Rims
